requestTitle.message: Which preprint would you like reviewed?
requestTitle.description: Heading of the page where a user can request a PREreview for a preprint.

useDoiUrl.message: Use the preprint DOI or URL.
useDoiUrl.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Which preprint would you like reviewed?”.

whatIsDoi.description: Heading for an explanation of what a DOI is.

whatIsDoiText.message: A <doi>DOI</doi> is a unique identifier that you can find on many preprints. For example, {example} or {exampleUrl}.
whatIsDoiText.description: Text following the heading “What is a DOI?” that explains what a DOI is and gives examples of what a DOI looks like.

errorEnterPreprint.message: Enter the preprint DOI or URL
errorEnterPreprint.description: Error message shown when the user tries to complete the form “Which preprint would you like reviewed?” without entering a value.

doNotKnowPreprint.message: Sorry, we don’t know this preprint
doNotKnowPreprint.description: Title of the page following the form “Which preprint would you like reviewed?” when we don’t recognize the preprint DOI or URL.

notAPreprint.description: Title of the page following the form “Which preprint would you like reviewed?” when the DOI or URL entered is not a preprint.

unsupportedDoiTitle.message: Sorry, we don’t support this DOI
unsupportedDoiTitle.description: Title of the page following the form “Which preprint would you like reviewed?” when we recognize the DOI format but don’t support the server it’s from.

unsupportedUrlTitle.message: Sorry, we don’t support this URL
unsupportedUrlTitle.description: Title of the page following the form “Which preprint would you like reviewed?” when we can’t work out the preprint DOI from the URL.

doiCouldBeAdvance.message: We think the DOI {doi} could be an Advance preprint, but we can’t find any details.
doiCouldBeAdvance.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we don’t know this preprint”.

checkCorrectDoi.message: If you typed the DOI, check it is correct.
checkCorrectDoi.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we don’t know this preprint”.

checkCorrectUrl.message: If you typed the URL, check it is correct.
checkCorrectUrl.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we don’t know this preprint”.

checkPastedDoi.message: If you pasted the DOI, check you copied the entire address.
checkPastedDoi.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we don’t know this preprint”.

checkPastedUrl.message: If you pasted the URL, check you copied the entire address.
checkPastedUrl.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we don’t know this preprint”.

doiIsCorrect.message: If the DOI is correct, please <contact>get in touch</contact>.
doiIsCorrect.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we don’t know this preprint”.

urlIsCorrect.message: If the URL is correct, please <contact>get in touch</contact>.
urlIsCorrect.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we don’t know this preprint”.

supportPreprintsFrom.description: Text shown alongside the titles “Sorry, we don’t support this DOI”, “Sorry, we don’t support this URL” and “Sorry, we only support preprints”.

isAPreprint.message: If this is a preprint, please <contact>get in touch</contact>.
isAPreprint.description: Text shown alongside the title “Sorry, we only support preprints.

doiContactUs.message: If this DOI is for a preprint on a server we don’t support, please <contact>get in touch</contact>.
doiContactUs.description: Text shown alongside the title “Sorry, we don’t support this DOI”.

urlContactUs.message: If this URL is for a preprint on a server we don’t support, please <contact>get in touch</contact>.
urlContactUs.description: Text shown alongside the title “Sorry, we don’t support this URL”.

tryDoi.message: Otherwise, if the preprint has a DOI, please try using that instead.
tryDoi.description: Text shown alongside the title “Sorry, we don’t support this URL”.
